name: Mercury
description: The smallest rocky planet with cratered terrain and a bright sunrise near the Sun.

name: Venus
description: A thick-clouded world with active volcanoes and a hot orange atmosphere.

name: Earth
description: Our home planet with oceans, weather, and many explored landing sites.

name: Moon
description: Earth's natural satellite with historic Apollo landing sites and quiet crater fields.

name: Apollo 11 Landing Site
description: First human landing site on the Moon, with a view across the Sea of Tranquility.

name: Mars
description: The red planet with dusty plains, polar ice caps, and rover exploration paths.

name: Jupiter
description: A giant gas planet with stormy clouds, glowing bands, and a bright Great Red Spot.

name: Saturn
description: A ringed gas giant known for its wide icy rings and many orbiting moons.

name: Uranus
description: An ice giant that rotates on its side with a pale blue-green atmosphere.

name: Neptune
description: A deep blue ice giant with the strongest winds in the solar system.

name: Pluto
description: A dwarf planet on the edge of the solar system with frozen nitrogen and icy mountains.
